articles.author: Manuel Rueda
articles.title: Colombia's rogue hippos could find refuge in India - NPR
articles.description: In Colombia, a plan to cull Pablo Escobar's invasive hippos is challenged by an Indian billionaire's offer to relocate dozens of the animals to India's wildlife reserve instead.
articles.content:
DORADAL, ColombiaIn a small town in central Colombia, the grunt of hippos has become part of the soundscape.
Every afternoon in Doradal, locals and tourists gather at a lake on the edge of town. The… [+4935 chars]
